---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement. Describe your suggestion and why it would be useful.
title: "feat(scope): <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: aditya-goyal01
---

**Describe the feature**
A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you are proposing.

**Problem it solves**
A clear and concise description of the problem this addresses. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Alternatives considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
